subcodes.first_line: O well-assured believer! Owing to lack of time, I will write briefly. Divine tests are intense, in order that one’s essence may be clearly manifested
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مومنه موقنه از عدم فرصت مختصر مرقوم میگردد امتحانات الهیه شدید است
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort
